entities.name: SIMPLE SEQUENCE REPEATS
entities.description: Molecular markers also known as microsatellites used for genome analysis and plant breeding

entities.name: GENOME ANALYSIS
entities.description: The study of the complete set of DNA within an organism

entities.name: PLANT BREEDING
entities.description: The science of changing the traits of plants to produce desired characteristics

entities.name: EXPRESSED SEQUENCE TAGS
entities.description: Short sub-sequences of a cDNA sequence used for gene identification

entities.name: SOYBEAN
entities.description: Legume species Glycine max

entities.name: MEDICAGO
entities.description: Legume species Medicago truncatula

entities.name: LOTUS
entities.description: Legume species Lotus japonicus

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: Cereal species Sorghum bicolor

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: Cereal species Oryza sativa

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: Cereal species Zea mays

entities.name: EST-SSRS
entities.description: Simple sequence repeats found within expressed sequence tags

entities.name: DATABASE
entities.description: A resource containing non-redundant EST-SSRs and primer pairs

entities.name: POLYMORPHISM
entities.description: Genetic variation at a specific locus between individuals

entities.name: STRIGA SUSCEPTIBILITY
entities.description: The vulnerability of a plant to Striga infestation

entities.name: STAY-GREEN
entities.description: A trait where leaves remain green longer during maturity or stress

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand drought conditions

entities.name: STRIGA RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to resist Striga infestation

entities.name: NON-STAY-GREEN
entities.description: The opposite of the stay-green trait

entities.name: E 36-1
entities.description: A sorghum mapping population parent that is Striga-susceptible, stay-green, and drought tolerant

entities.name: N13
entities.description: A sorghum mapping population parent that is Striga-resistant and non-stay-green

entities.name: PCR
entities.description: Polymerase Chain Reaction used to amplify DNA segments

entities.name: GENOTYPING
entities.description: The process of determining the genetic makeup of an organism

entities.name: RECOMBINANT INBRED LINES
entities.description: Lines produced by crossing two different parents and selfing for several generations

entities.name: LINKAGE GROUPS
entities.description: Groups of genes that are located close together on the same chromosome
